Eurovision Song Contest

🇬🇷2006

Olympic Indoor Hall · Athen , Greece

"Feel The Rhythm"

Hosted by Maria Menounos · Sakis Rouvas Broadcaster Ellinikí Radiofonía Tileórasi (ERT)
